mapper.select:
SELECT cg.id::text AS "groupId", cg.group_code AS "groupCode", cg.group_name AS "groupName", cg.description AS "groupDescription", cg.use_yn AS "groupUseYn", cg.sort_order AS "groupSortOrder", cg.created_at AS "groupCreatedAt", cg.updated_at AS "groupUpdatedAt", c.id::text AS id, c.code, c.name, c.description, c.extra, c.use_yn AS "useYn", c.sort_order AS "sortOrder", c.created_at AS "createdAt", c.updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM code_group cg LEFT JOIN code c ON c.group_id = cg.id
AND c.use_yn = #{useYn}
WHERE cg.use_yn = 'Y'
AND cg.group_code = ANY(${groupCodes})
ORDER BY cg.sort_order, cg.group_code, c.sort_order, c.code
